Backend engineer with Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Docker delivery for product and workflow platforms.

SUMMARY
Product-minded backend engineer focused on reliable APIs, matching systems, and measurable delivery improvements.

EXPERIENCE
- Built FastAPI services for a workflow platform that handled matching, review, and status updates for hiring operations.
- Designed PostgreSQL tables and SQL queries that supported search, filtering, and recommendation scoring.
- Added structured logging and metrics dashboards that reduced time to diagnose API incidents from hours to minutes.
- Shipped Dockerized services and reproducible local environments for a team of 6 engineers.
- Worked closely with frontend engineers to simplify API payloads and remove brittle response mapping.

PROJECTS
- Built an internal job matching tool that compared job requirements against CV evidence and highlighted concrete gaps.
- Created an admin dashboard that exposed API usage, error rates, and deployment health in one view.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQL, Docker, AWS, observability, API design, testing, documentation
